title: Human Copulation Project hentai script translation
display_title: Human Copulation Project hentai script translation
wikitext:
[]: 'Human Copulation Project' hentai script translation             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Sep 08, 2011 3:59 pm http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/oldeva/2001-March/039296.html One of the few finds I've wondered whether to simply ignore and not note anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 7:17 pm Is this that video that everyone and their brother has seen? Where Gendo keeps smiling?

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Sep 08, 2011 7:32 pm I assume so. I mean, how many could there possibly be?

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 7:49 pm gwern wrote: I assume so. I mean, how many could there possibly be?

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Sep 08, 2011 7:53 pm Since the email is in early 2001, the described video would have to have been produced a while earlier.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 7:59 pm gwern wrote: Since the email is in early 2001, the described video would have to have been produced a while earlier.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Sep 08, 2011 8:16 pm (Shinji ejaculates) Rei: It's slightly yellow.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 8:59 pm Wow, Gwern. You really are thorough.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 09, 2011 12:59 am Razeil100 wrote: a few more movies floating around.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Fri Sep 09, 2011 1:08 am Mr. Tines wrote: Well, there's the recent JAV with that guy in.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Sep 09, 2011 1:16 am Mr. Tines wrote: Well, there's the recent JAV with that guy in.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 09, 2011 1:32 am Razeil100 wrote: Uh... that guy ?

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Fri Sep 09, 2011 1:35 am Mr. Tines wrote: Nicknamed Goro-kun on /a/, he looks about 40, and is living the dream by playing the 14-17 year old male lead in a stream of parody cosporno videos, using recent -- often currently airing -- anime series as the starting point.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Fri Sep 09, 2011 2:58 pm I regret reading that script (argh damn you visual imagination)

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Fri Sep 09, 2011 3:36 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Wow, Gwern. You really are thorough.

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Fri Sep 09, 2011 7:52 pm Razeil100 wrote: Is this that video that everyone and their brother has seen? Where Gendo keeps smiling?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Sep 09, 2011 8:17 pm Don't worry, I don't know what they're talking about either. But the script looks funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Fri Sep 09, 2011 8:20 pm Deepak wrote: I blame my only childness for not knowing what in the world this video you are talking about is.

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Fri Sep 09, 2011 9:15 pm The fact that you can adapt so many lines straight from EVA into a hentai is both amazing and disturbing at the same time. I... am still not sure how to react to this.

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sat Sep 10, 2011 12:03 pm Sephizim wrote: The fact that you can adapt so many lines straight from EVA into a hentai is both amazing and disturbing at the same time. I... am still not sure how to react to this.
